title: Valid Parentheses
problem_statement: Given a string containing parentheses, determine if the input is valid with correctly matched pairs.

examples.explanation: Each opening bracket has a matching closing bracket in the correct order.

constraints: s consists of parentheses characters only.
intuition: Use a stack to match each closing bracket with the most recent opening bracket.

approaches.name: Stack matching
approaches.description: Push opening brackets onto a stack and pop when a matching closing bracket appears.
approaches.why_not: Counting brackets without order fails to detect nesting errors.
interview_commentary: Push expected closing brackets onto the stack instead of opening brackets for simpler matching.
A mismatch or leftover opening bracket indicates an invalid string.
This handles nested brackets and different bracket types in one linear pass.

interview_qa.a: It simplifies the comparison when a closing bracket appears.
A closing bracket mismatching the stack top or remaining unmatched opening brackets.
